subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: To reduce greenhouse gas emissions, to the degree necessary, a heated water service is to—

ol.li: be capable of efficiently using energy; and

obtain its heating energy from—
a low greenhouse gas intensity energy source; or
an on-site renewable energy source; or
another process as reclaimed energy.

callout.p: The greenhouse gas intensity of energy sources vary. For example, natural gas has a low greenhouse gas intensity compared with electricity generated from coal.
For the purposes of B2F3(b), the renewable energy source must be on-site (not GreenPower) and includes, but is not limited to solar, wind, hydroelectric, wave action and geothermal.
